title: 想問下有冇人聽同人音樂(doujin music)

replies.msg:
好似日本嘅 sakuzyo, xi, taishi, FELT, F9 etc
香港好似好少人聽？
我自己最鍾意sakuzyo lost memory
https://youtu.be/_oq9UAV028U

My cousin practises these songs eight hours a day in pursuit of gaining a distinction in her graded exam. She's single-minded in her pursuit of her goal. I've never met anyone so ambitious and single-minded. A french hornist with whom she's rehearsing is also very single-minded and dedicated in pursuit of studying a degree course at a conservatory. Both of them have something in common which is the single-minded pursuit of their goals. A friend of mine samantha is planning on starting a tv network. She's already fired up and ruthless and dedicated in pursuit of profit. She wants to have one channel dedicated to basketball and another channel dedicated to combat sports. She's devoted to making it the best dedicated sports network in the world. My friend Joe thinks that if a woman without makeup is still pretty then she's pretty. Not every man's type of women is the same. Of course everybody likes handsome and beautiful people. In terms of appearance some men like sporty women, some like petite women, some like svelte women, some like them tall and thin, some like them well-rounded and curvaceous, some like them voluptuous, some like busty women, some like wide hips, done like shapely legs, some like silky feet and so forth. In terms of personality, some men like vivacious women, some like kind-hearted and helpful women, some like them compassionate, some like them tactful and diplomatic, some like them quiet, some like them sociable and talkative, some like to be controlled and dominated and so on. Joe is a fan of tracy Zhu and samantha Gao, both of whom are exquisitely beautiful women. Like Joe, they both have an exquisite taste in fashion, shoes, interior and exterior design. Both are glamorous women who always dress up in glamorous outfits. They rarely dress down. I once saw samantha dress ho in eighties clothing for a party while tracy was in a kimono for it. They both have a glamorous job and career. I consider acting a worthwhile career. Samantha has got a leading role in the new television series whereas tracy has got a supporting role in it. She plays the role of a lawyer in it.

多數呢啲artist都係打音game識

replies.msg:
小學雞唔聽古典/複雜音樂好正常。
就算成人都係咁。
以前我都認為自己唔會聽古典，但人大咗係會學識轉換角度去聽音樂。
Btw講同人音樂其實真係無乜意思，因為只係一種音樂嘅創作形式，正如其他人聽同人vocal而你可能只聽同人instrumental咁。
